languages.text: ""Ересь" — так выразился Диодас, впервые повстречавшись со мной. С того момента он всегда был на хвосте, выслеживая меня, пытаясь уличить в предательстве Империума. Узколобый болван! Диодас решил, что Инквизиция обладает достаточной властью, чтобы судить меня, Помазанника Бога-Императора!"

traits.locale_text: ""Ересь" — так выразился Диодас, впервые повстречавшись со мной. С того момента он всегда был на хвосте, выслеживая меня, пытаясь уличить в предательстве Империума. Узколобый болван! Диодас решил, что Инквизиция обладает достаточной властью, чтобы судить меня, Помазанника Бога-Императора!"

languages.text: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"
languages.original_text: ""Ересь" — так выразился Диодас, впервые повстречавшись со мной. С того момента он всегда был на хвосте, выслеживая меня, пытаясь уличить в предательстве Империума. Узколобый болван! Диодас решил, что Инквизиция обладает достаточной властью, чтобы судить меня, Помазанника Бога-Императора!"

traits.locale_text: "'Heresy' — that was Diodas's word when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. A narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition possessed sufficient authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

"'Heresy' — that was Diodas's word when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. A narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition possessed sufficient authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

"'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

"'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

languages.text: "Ketzerei ... das sagte Diodas, als wir uns das erste Mal begegneten. Von diesem Moment an war er mir ständig auf den Fersen. Er hat mich förmlich gejagt, um zu beweisen, dass ich das Imperium verraten hatte. Dieser engstirnige Narr! Diodas dachte, die Inquisition hätte das Recht, über mich zu richten, den Gesalbten des Gottimperators!"
languages.original_text: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Ketzerei ... das sagte Diodas, als wir uns das erste Mal begegneten. Von diesem Moment an war er mir ständig auf den Fersen. Er hat mich förmlich gejagt, um zu beweisen, dass ich das Imperium verraten hatte. Dieser engstirnige Narr! Diodas dachte, die Inquisition hätte das Recht, über mich zu richten, den Gesalbten des Gottimperators!"

languages.text: « "Hérésie" : c'est le mot que Diodas a prononcé la première fois qu'il m'a vu. Et dès cet instant, je l'ai eu à mes trousses, prêt à tout pour prouver que j'avais trahi l'Imperium. Un bel imbécile à l'esprit étriqué ! Diodas estimait que l'Inquisition avait l'autorité de me juger, moi, l'élu de l'Empereur-Dieu ! »
languages.original_text: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: « "Hérésie" : c'est le mot que Diodas a prononcé la première fois qu'il m'a vu. Et dès cet instant, je l'ai eu à mes trousses, prêt à tout pour prouver que j'avais trahi l'Imperium. Un bel imbécile à l'esprit étriqué ! Diodas estimait que l'Inquisition avait l'autorité de me juger, moi, l'élu de l'Empereur-Dieu ! »

languages.text: «"Hereje". Esa fue la primera palabra de Diodas al verme. Desde ese momento, siempre me pisó los talones, buscando darme caza y demostrar que había traicionado al Imperium. ¡Menudo mentecato! Diodas creía que la Inquisición estaba en posición de juzgarme a mí, ¡al ungido del Dios Emperador!».
languages.original_text: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: «"Hereje". Esa fue la primera palabra de Diodas al verme. Desde ese momento, siempre me pisó los talones, buscando darme caza y demostrar que había traicionado al Imperium. ¡Menudo mentecato! Diodas creía que la Inquisición estaba en posición de juzgarme a mí, ¡al ungido del Dios Emperador!».

languages.text: "Diodas benimle ilk karşılaştığında buna 'kâfirlik' demişti. O andan sonra peşime düştü... Beni avlıyor, İmparatorluk'a ihanet ettiğimi kanıtlamaya çalışıyordu. Dar görüşlü aptal! Diodas, Engizisyon'un Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişi olsam da beni yargılama yetkisine sahip olduğuna inanıyordu!"
languages.original_text: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Diodas benimle ilk karşılaştığında buna 'kâfirlik' demişti. O andan sonra peşime düştü... Beni avlıyor, İmparatorluk'a ihanet ettiğimi kanıtlamaya çalışıyordu. Dar görüşlü aptal! Diodas, Engizisyon'un Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişi olsam da beni yargılama yetkisine sahip olduğuna inanıyordu!"

languages.text: “‘异端’——狄奥达斯第一次见到我就这么说。从那一刻起，他就一直咬着我不放，对我展开猎杀，想要证明我背叛了帝国。那个心胸狭隘的蠢货！狄奥达斯竟然以为审判庭有权力审判我，我可是神皇神选者！”
languages.original_text: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: “‘异端’——狄奥达斯第一次见到我就这么说。从那一刻起，他就一直咬着我不放，对我展开猎杀，想要证明我背叛了帝国。那个心胸狭隘的蠢货！狄奥达斯竟然以为审判庭有权力审判我，我可是神皇神选者！”

languages.text: 「異端」…ディオダスが初めて私と出会った時、彼はそう言った。その瞬間から、彼は私を追いかけ、私を捕まえようとした。帝国内で私を裏切ったことを証明しようとしたのだ。狭い視野の愚か者！ディオダスは、私を裁く権限はインキジネーションにあると信じていたのだ。私は皇帝の選民である！
languages.original_text: "'Heresy' — that was what Diodas said when he first encountered me. From that moment, he was always on my heels, hunting me, trying to prove I had betrayed the Imperium. The narrow-minded fool! Diodas believed the Inquisition had the authority to judge me, the anointed of the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: 「異端」…ディオダスが初めて私と出会った時、彼はそう言った。その瞬間から、彼は私を追いかけ、私を捕まえようとした。帝国内で私を裏切ったことを証明しようとしたのだ。狭い視野の愚か者！ディオダスは、私を裁く権限はインキジネーションにあると信じていたのだ。私は皇帝の選民である！
